content.problemStatement: Read problem statements in RussianChef has been searching for a good motivational movie that he can watch during his exam time. His hard disk has XXX GB of space remaining. His friend has NNN movies represented with (Si,Ri)(S_i, R_i)(Si​,Ri​)  representing (space required, IMDB rating). Help Chef choose the single best movie (highest IMDB rating) that can fit in his hard disk.
constraints: At least one movie satisfies Si <= X for each test case
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. For each test case, the first line contains two integers N and X – the number of movies and the free space on Chef's hard disk. Then N lines follow, each containing two integers Si and Ri – the space required by the i‑th movie and its IMDB rating.
content.outputFormat: For each test case output a single line containing the highest IMDB rating among movies whose required space Si does not exceed X.

sampleTestCases.explanation: Test case 1: only movie fits, rating 1. Test case 2: both movies fit, higher rating is 100. Test case 3: movies with space 1 and 2 fit, higher rating among them is 51.

solution.approach: For each test case iterate over all N movies, keep a variable bestRating initialized to 0. For every movie check if its required space Si is less than or equal to the available space X. If it fits and its rating Ri is larger than bestRating, update bestRating. After processing all movies, bestRating holds the answer. This is a straightforward linear scan requiring O(N) time and O(1) extra memory.
solution.timeComplexity: O(N) per test case, where N is the number of movies in that test case.

code.C:
#include <stdio.h>
int main(){int T; if(scanf("%d",&T)!=1) return 0; while(T--){int N; long long X; scanf("%d %lld",&N,&X); long long best=0; for(int i=0;i<N;i++){ long long S,R; scanf("%lld %lld",&S,&R); if(S<=X && R>best) best=R; } printf("%lld\n",best); } return 0;}
code.Python3:
import sys

def solve():
    data = sys.stdin.read().split()
    it = iter(data)
    T = int(next(it))
    out = []
    for _ in range(T):
        N = int(next(it)); X = int(next(it))
        best = 0
        for __ in range(N):
            S = int(next(it)); R = int(next(it))
            if S <= X and R > best:
                best = R
        out.append(str(best))
    sys.stdout.write('\n'.join(out))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    solve()
